name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose offers same-day personal loans, payday loans, title loans, and cash advances from $250–$50,000 at their Detroit location, welcoming all credit types.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose operates a physical lending location at 3403 Grand River Ave in Detroit, Michigan, serving consumers who need quick access to cash. The company markets itself as accessible to borrowers across all credit profiles, emphasizing speed and ease of application. They are open seven days a week (Mon–Fri 7am–8pm, Sat–Sun 9am–6pm) and staff a local phone line for questions. Their parent company or corporate office is listed as being in Atlanta, Georgia.

The company offers a broad portfolio of short-term lending products. These include cash advances (under $1,000), payday loans (up to $1,000), installment loans ($1,000–$5,000), personal loans (up to $50,000), title loans secured by vehicle equity (up to $50,000), and same-day unsecured loans. They explicitly market "all credit types welcome" across most products, positioning themselves as willing to lend to consumers with poor or limited credit histories. Their stated goal is fast approval with minimal documentation.

Loan For Any Purpose distinguishes itself primarily through product variety and credit flexibility rather than unique terms or rates. They offer both secured (title) and unsecured lending, allowing consumers to choose based on collateral availability. The physical location provides in-person service, which may appeal to borrowers uncomfortable with online-only lending. Same-day and fast-approval messaging is consistent across their marketing. However, the website provides no specific information about interest rates, fees, repayment terms, or APR ranges—critical details for comparing cost.

This is a legitimate short-term lender targeting cash-strapped consumers with limited credit options. The disclaimer language about PATRIOT Act compliance, credit inquiry impact, and recommendation to seek credit counseling for ongoing difficulties suggests regulatory awareness. However, consumers should understand that these products typically carry high costs and are designed for short-term needs only. No rate or fee information is disclosed on the website, making true cost comparison impossible without contacting the company directly.
address: 2842 E Anaheim St STE 104, Long Beach, CA 90804

company_info.headquarters: 2842 E Anaheim St STE 104, Long Beach, CA 90804

pros: Physical location in Detroit open 7 days per week with extended evening hours (Mon–Fri until 8pm)
No credit score requirement for most products; explicitly welcomes all credit types including bad credit borrowers
Wide range of loan amounts ($250–$50,000) accommodates different emergency levels
Same-day and fast approval loans with minimal documentation requirement
Title loans offer access to larger amounts (up to $50,000) for borrowers with vehicle equity
Installment loans available as alternative to payday loans for amounts $1,000–$5,000
Local phone support at (313) 228-3440 for customer questions and accessibility assistance
cons: Website discloses zero information about interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules—impossible to assess true cost
Short-term lending products typically carry high costs; company disclaimers warn these are not long-term solutions
No transparency on approval odds, actual loan amounts approved versus requested, or typical repayment terms
Website pulls from non-traditional consumer reporting agencies, which may impact credit beyond FICO (though doesn't directly affect FICO score)
Title loans create risk of vehicle repossession if borrower cannot repay
best_for: Workers facing unexpected emergencies needing $250–$1,000 with same-day funding
Borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for bank personal loans
Vehicle owners needing larger amounts ($5,000–$50,000) who can use title as collateral
Consumers preferring in-person lending interactions over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for consumers facing immediate cash shortages of $250–$1,000 who have poor or no credit history and cannot qualify for bank loans. The critical caveat is that no interest rates, APRs, or fees are disclosed online—borrowers must contact the company directly to understand true cost, and should be aware that these products typically carry high expenses and are designed only for short-term emergency needs.
services: Title loans (secured by vehicle, up to $50,000)
In-person application and funding at physical location
